_note: Somali bundle is a scaffold for the pilot. Only safety-critical strings are translated.

pilot.notice: Tijaabo. Lama xidhiidhsana NHS. Wax aan tallaabadaada lahayn lama wadaago.

support.title: Haddii aad hadda u baahantahay caawimaad
support.intro: Safeguard ma aha adeeg caafimaad. Haddii aad hadda u baahantahay caawimaad, fadlan la xidhiidh kuwan.

nhs111.name: NHS 111
nhs111.what: Khadka talo-bixinta caafimaad ee bilaashka ah ee UK, 24 saac.

samaritans.name: Samaritans
samaritans.what: Khad sirta ah oo dhageysiga, 24 saac.
